title: Tokenized RWA market grows 420% since 2025 on regulatory clarity, access
snippet: Tokenized US Treasurys were one of the biggest growth areas of the RWA market, rising from a market capitalization of $3.9 billion at the start of 2025 to more than $15 billion.

title: Kast hires former SEC official Stephanie Allen to lead policy communications
snippet: Stablecoin payments company Kast hired former SEC adviser Stephanie Allen as it expands licensing, communications and policy efforts after an $80 million raise.

title: US gov’t sues four states, RWAs cross $30 billion: Month in Charts
snippet: The US CFTC has sued four states for trying to enforce state-level gambling laws on prediction markets, meanwhile Strategy stacked over 56,000 BTC.

title: Tether-backed Oobit rolls out virtual Visa cards for AI agent USDT spending
snippet: The Agent Cards launched to a select group of businesses on Thursday, with a limited number of additional companies set to gain access over the next two months.

title: Malaysian sovereign fund pilots tokenized sukuk with $25m issuance
snippet: Khazanah, Malaysia’s sovereign wealth fund, has issued a RM100 million ($25m) tokenized sukuk in collaboration with the Securities Commission Malaysia. title: Brazil central bank prohibits crypto use in regulated cross-border payments under new FX rules
snippet: The rule forms part of the central bank's broader effort to bring cross-border payments fully inside the regulated FX system.

title: Coinbase’s ‘CUSHY’ stablecoin fund to launch tokenized share class via Superstate in Q2
snippet: The Coinbase Stablecoin Yield Fund aims to generate yield by lending stablecoins and private credit investment opportunities.

title: Bakkt completes acquisition of stablecoin payments firm Distributed Technologies Research
snippet: Bakkt announced the deal in January, which was originally for 9.3 million shares, along with a corporate name change to Bakkt Inc.

title: UK regulator clears path for tokenized funds within existing rules
snippet: The FCA signs off rules to let UK funds keep registers onchain and add a new Direct‑to‑Fund dealing model, aiming to simplify tokenized funds inside the existing regime.

title: MoonPay launches stablecoin debit card for AI agents on Mastercard network
snippet: MoonPay has launched "MoonAgents Card," a stablecoin debit card for AI agents and users to spend directly from onchain wallets.

snippet: Brazil’s central bank barred virtual assets from settlement inside regulated eFX payment rails as it tightens oversight of crypto-linked flows.

title: Tether-backed startup Oobit offers AI bots Visa-supported corporate expense cards

title: Spain emerges as leading EURC retail market in Europe, Brighty data shows

title: HederaCon 2026 comes to Miami Beach on May 4 — Last chance to join leaders in tokenization and digital finance
snippet: HederaCon 2026 will take place on May 4 at the Faena Forum in Miami Beach, bringing together leaders from global finance, policy, and enterprise to explore how tokenization, stablecoins, interoperability, and AI-powered financial systems are moving into real-world adoption.
